description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house surrounded by a low white perimeter wall and landscaped with several mature trees in the front yard. The structure features a complex, multi-hipped roof with varying heights and angles, giving it a contemporary yet classic suburban appearance. The front facade is characterized by a prominent balcony above the main entrance, large windows, and a double garage with a wide driveway. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area and a rectangular swimming pool, enclosed within the same perimeter wall. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or cream color, contrasting with the darker gray roof. The property includes paved walkways, steps leading to the main entrance, and a mix of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a multi-hipped roof, light-colored walls, a front balcony, double garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, double garage, and several trees within the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, small windows, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, swimming pool, and expansive windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the perimeter wall, trees, and the house's side elevation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and grouped sets
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, balcony above, and double doors flanked by large windows.
